fields.acceptance_criteria: Rewritten spec removes workflow docs wrapper as target surface; doc-api owns documentation validation metadata; doc-cli is the primary CLI surface; manual and generated-guidance checks are captured in native workflow metadata
fields.title: Rewrite doc validation spec around doc-api and doc-cli
